completedPhaseClaims.summary: Authored spec.md: Problem, Outcome Contract, 4 FIXED constraints, Scope Boundary, Conformance Mapping to knb spec 025 (CBR-010 closure), 5 user stories (SCN-085-A..E), 13 FR + 6 NFR, Product Principle Alignment (P6 enabled, P10 not crossed), Release Train (mvp), Per-Platform Artifact Plan (android only), 5 routed Open Questions, 7 Success Criteria.

Non-UI UX: defined the operator/CI workflow surface — fail-loud blocked envelopes (E025-CLIENT-* via the knb gate), the WARN-if-missing-knb-checkout pre-push behavior mirroring deploy-cli-uniformity, default-OFF Lane-B status language (clientReleaseLaneB), and the operator decision points captured as routed Open Questions.

Authored design.md: Current-Truth verified-path map (smackerel build.yml/deploy contract/release trains/pre-push + knb gate/lib/schema), contract clients: schema, CI build-clients job design, reproducibility model (SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH + commit-derived version), two-signature model (cosign-keyless provenance vs operator-private Android distribution), Lane A (knb adapter) vs Lane B (coded/flag-gated), pre-push/CI wiring, and the knb-gate conformance self-check incl. OQ-1/OQ-2.

Authored scopes.md: 5 dependency-ordered scopes (Not Started) — 01 contract clients group, 02 CI client-build job, 03 Android distribution signing, 04 Lane-B Play Store lane, 05 pre-push+CI gate wiring; Gherkin SCN-085-A01..E05; ./smackerel.sh-surface Test Plans; tiered checkbox DoD. Scope 05 carries the explicit OQ-2 upstream-blocked dependency; Scope 04 routes the feature-flag-bundle edits to bubbles.train.

Hardened the plan against smackerel-no-defaults (clientReleaseLaneB read with no fallback default), terminal discipline (./smackerel.sh Test Plan surface), the knb adapter boundary (no client build in any adapter; smackerel never calls the Lane-A lib directly), and the release-train/flag-lifecycle model (G111 verified clean for dormant-everywhere). Confirmed no knb/framework file is touched (composed by reference).

Delivery (parent-expanded). Scope 01: added the additive clients: android block to deploy/contract.yaml (canonical schema) + Go contract-drift test. Scope 02: build-clients job in build.yml (reproducible SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH + commit-derived version; cosign-keyless; oras push by digest; no ssh) + scripts/deploy/client-manifest-clients-block.sh fail-closed emitter + manifest wiring. Scope 03: env-ref signingConfigs.release in example/android/app/build.gradle.kts. Scope 04: dormant flag-gated .github/workflows/client-release-laneb.yml + clientReleaseLaneB:false in both train bundles (parent-expanded bubbles.train action, disclosed). Scope 05: 2nd pre-push block + .github/workflows/client-binary-conformance.yml CI safety-net. Reconciled knb/smackerel/contract.yaml mirror to the canonical schema (cross-repo lockstep).

16 new Go tests pass natively (6 contract-drift, 4 emitter fail-closed, 6 workflow-contract), each with adversarial coverage; full internal/deploy suite green (ok, 31.4s, nothing broke). knb gate --repo EXIT 91 (baseline) -> 0 (conformant); mirror-mode gate EXIT 0. actionlint EXIT 0 on build-clients + both new workflows (2 pre-existing build-chrome-bridge findings at build.yml:385 are spec 058, not 085). shellcheck/shfmt clean on the emitter + pre-push. release-train-guard reports zero clientReleaseLaneB/G111 violations. CI-runtime steps (real AAB/APK build, OCI push, real digests, two-run determinism, distribution+cosign signing, Play submit) are coded + statically verified and produce the first real artifact on next push with operator secrets — explicitly not claimed as executed.

Repo-standard Build Quality Gate trio green: ./smackerel.sh check=0 (config-in-sync + env_file-drift + scenario-lint), lint=0 (go-lint + python-lint + web-validate), format --check=0 (65 files formatted). All 5 scopes Done; every DoD item checked with evidence and an honest CI-runtime-vs-local-proof split. Two out-of-scope observations routed (not mine): pre-existing BUG-073-003 missing-releaseTrain (drives the release-train-guard overall exit non-zero; another spec) and the 2 build-chrome-bridge actionlint findings (spec 058).

scopeProgress.name: CI Client-Build Job (AAB+APK, reproducible, cosign-keyless, ghcr-by-digest, manifest clients.artifacts)
Lane-B Play Store Lane (CODED, default-OFF behind clientReleaseLaneB)

executionHistory.executionNote: full-delivery (node n6) run; the runSubagent/agent tool was UNAVAILABLE in this runtime, so the delivery phases (implement, test, validate) were executed in parent-expanded form by a single orchestrator agent (bubbles.workflow) that authored the code + evidence directly. No separate certified specialist sub-agents (bubbles.implement/test/validate) were dispatched or claimed. Disclosed per governance, not fabricated. parent-expansion is permitted because full-delivery is not a requiresTopLevelRuntime mode. The config/feature-flags.{mvp,next}.yaml clientReleaseLaneB:false edits were made as a parent-expanded bubbles.train action (the sole bundle writer) and are disclosed here. The cross-repo knb/smackerel/contract.yaml mirror reconciliation (kinds/laneBTarget -> canonical kind/provenance/embeds/laneB) is a knb working-tree change disclosed in report.md; the mirror's own comment designates this downstream smackerel node as the reconciler.
executionHistory.expansionReason: runSubagent/agent tool unavailable in this runtime; the full-delivery phases were parent-expanded by the bubbles.workflow orchestrator
executionHistory.summary: Implemented all 5 scopes of smackerel's native client binary release pipeline (knb spec 025 conformance; closes CBR-010 for smackerel). knb gate --repo went EXIT 91 (E025-CLIENT-SOURCE-NO-CONTRACT) -> 0 (conformant); mirror-mode gate EXIT 0. 16 new Go tests pass (contract-drift 6, emitter fail-closed 4, workflow-contract 6) with adversarial coverage; full internal/deploy suite green. Repo-standard Build Quality Gate trio green (check=0, lint=0, format --check=0). actionlint/shellcheck/shfmt clean on every new/changed surface (2 pre-existing build-chrome-bridge findings at build.yml:385 are spec 058). clientReleaseLaneB declared default-OFF in both train bundles (G111-clean dormant). OQ-1/OQ-2 RESOLVED upstream by knb BUG-001, unblocking Scope 05's --repo green-run. CI-runtime steps (real AAB/APK build, OCI push, real digests, determinism, distribution+cosign signing, Play submit, safety-net+pre-push firing in their venues) are coded + statically verified and produce their first real artifact on next push with operator secrets — explicitly NOT claimed as executed (anti-fabrication boundary honored). Out-of-scope observations routed: pre-existing BUG-073-003 (different spec, drives release-train-guard overall non-zero) and the 2 build-chrome-bridge actionlint findings (spec 058).

executionHistory.executionNote: product-to-planning run; the runSubagent/agent tool was UNAVAILABLE in this runtime, so the planning phases (analyze, ux, design, plan, harden) were executed in parent-expanded form by a single orchestrator agent (bubbles.workflow) that authored the planning artifacts directly. No separate certified specialist sub-agents (bubbles.analyst/ux/design/plan/harden) were dispatched or claimed. Disclosed per governance, not fabricated. parent-expansion is permitted because product-to-planning is not a requiresTopLevelRuntime mode and the ceiling is specs_hardened (reviewable documents, not code/test certification). NO implementation, CI, deploy/contract.yaml, gradle, or config/feature-flags.<train>.yaml edit was made. No knb/framework file was touched (pattern composed by reference). The feature-flag-bundle edits for clientReleaseLaneB are bubbles.train-owned and deferred to the delivery node.
executionHistory.expansionReason: runSubagent/agent tool unavailable in this runtime; the product-to-planning phases were parent-expanded by the bubbles.workflow orchestrator
executionHistory.summary: Planned smackerel's native client binary release pipeline conforming to knb spec 025 (closes CBR-010 for smackerel). Authored spec.md (13 FR + 6 NFR; conformance mapping table; android-only per the absent ios/ target; Release Train mvp; clientReleaseLaneB default-OFF, G111-clean), design.md (verified Current-Truth paths; contract clients: schema; CI build-clients job; reproducibility via SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH; two-signature model; Lane A via knb adapter, Lane B coded/flag-gated; knb-gate conformance self-check), and scopes.md (5 dependency-ordered scopes, SCN-085-A01..E05, ./smackerel.sh Test Plans, tiered DoD). Two knb-gate-owned conformance findings routed upstream: OQ-1 (detect_client_source path gap — smackerel's Flutter app at clients/mobile/assistant/ is not auto-detected) and OQ-2 (scan_laneb_autosubmit bare-token false positives — deliver/supply/pilot match 60+ smackerel files, blocking Scope 05's --repo green-run). OQ-3 (ios) → product owner; OQ-4 (Lane-B owning train) → bubbles.train; OQ-5 (sideload vs upload key) → product/devops owner. Next: delivery node implements scopes 01-05 (and bubbles.train edits the flag bundles) once knb resolves OQ-2.
